title: 读取来宾 KVP 键值对
output:
VM='<chinese-name>' IntrinsicItems=7 GuestItems=0
VM='User1' IntrinsicItems=21 GuestItems=1
VM='Server' IntrinsicItems=21 GuestItems=1

Parsed intrinsic KVP from VM 'User1':
  CSDVersion =
  FullyQualifiedDomainName = User1
  IntegrationServicesVersion = 10.0.26100
  NetworkAddressIPv4 = <deprecated placeholder note: use Msvm_GuestNetworkAdapterConfiguration>
  OSBuildNumber = 10011
  OSEditionId = 161
  OSMajorVersion = 10
  OSMinorVersion = 0
  OSName = Windows 10 Pro for Workstations
  OSPlatformId = 2
  OSVersion = 10.0.26100
  ProcessorArchitecture = 9
  ProductType = 1
  ServicePackMajor = 0
  SuiteMask = 256

ASSERT PASS: OSName=Windows 10 Pro for Workstations; OSVersion=10.0.26100; FQDN=User1; matchedKeys=OSName,OSVersion,FullyQualifiedDomainName,NetworkAddressIPv4,OSPlatformId,CSDVersion,OSBuildNumber,OSMajorVersion
notes: 纯读操作,无需创建测试虚拟机: 直接枚举 Msvm_KvpExchangeComponent,每个实例对应一台正在运行且 KVP 集成组件已激活的虚拟机。停机或未启用 KVP 集成组件的虚拟机不会出现该实例。
经 $kvp.GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem') 反查所属虚拟机名称。

GuestIntrinsicExchangeItems 为来宾操作系统自动上报的固有键(OSName/OSVersion/FullyQualifiedDomainName/IntegrationServicesVersion/OSBuildNumber 等); GuestExchangeItems 为来宾内组件主动推送的键。两者均为 string[],每个元素是 Msvm_KvpExchangeDataItem 的内嵌 CIM XML 实例。
解析每个元素时用 [xml] 后取 INSTANCE.PROPERTY 中 NAME='Name' 与 NAME='Data' 的 VALUE,即为键名与键值。
NetworkAddressIPv4/IPv6 与 RDPAddressIPv4/IPv6 这几个 KVP 键已废弃,其 Data 不是真实 IP 而是一段提示文本,要求改用 Msvm_GuestNetworkAdapterConfiguration 获取 IP。读取 IP 不应依赖 KVP。
不同虚拟机上报的固有项数量可能不一致,项数较少者可能缺少 OSName/OSVersion。可选择项数最多的实例进行解析以获取最完整的操作系统信息。
notes_en: A read-only operation that requires no test virtual machine: enumerate Msvm_KvpExchangeComponent directly, where each instance corresponds to a running virtual machine whose KVP integration component is activated. Virtual machines that are stopped or that do not have the KVP integration component enabled do not produce such an instance.
Resolve the owning virtual machine name via $kvp.GetRelated('Msvm_ComputerSystem').

GuestIntrinsicExchangeItems holds the intrinsic keys reported automatically by the guest operating system (OSName/OSVersion/FullyQualifiedDomainName/IntegrationServicesVersion/OSBuildNumber, and so on); GuestExchangeItems holds the keys actively pushed by a component inside the guest. Both are string[], and each element is an embedded CIM XML instance of Msvm_KvpExchangeDataItem.
To parse each element, apply [xml] and read the VALUE of NAME='Name' and NAME='Data' under INSTANCE.PROPERTY, which are the key name and key value.

The KVP keys NetworkAddressIPv4/IPv6 and RDPAddressIPv4/IPv6 are deprecated; their Data is not the actual IP but a hint text directing the caller to use Msvm_GuestNetworkAdapterConfiguration to obtain the IP. Reading the IP should not rely on KVP.

The number of intrinsic items reported may differ between virtual machines, and an instance with fewer items may lack OSName/OSVersion. The instance with the most items can be chosen for parsing to obtain the most complete operating system information.
